payload.summary: PR #13 review round 2: Codex accepted 5/6 fixes, blocked on ADR-0013 letter-vs-behavior. Jim approved amending ADR-0013 (epic-status-wins, PRD status preserved in journal, divergence noted) over literal lift. Amendment + PRD F8.2 + code comments + payload epic_status landed in b935b25, pushed. 857/0, tsc+validate clean. Reply posted; awaiting round 3.
